title: kuruna wightiana var. hispida
intro: Kuruna wightiana var. hispida, also known as a type of wild curry tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues, due to the presence of bioactive compounds such as limonoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Kuruna wightiana var. hispida include its potential to treat fever, cough, and digestive problems, as well as its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder, and is used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tonics, to harness its medicinal properties.
